implementationFlow.notes: Screens, pages, commands, routes, jobs, or API entry points.
Controllers, hooks, blocs, services, state, loading, errors, and wiring.
Repositories, clients, schemas, migrations, generated types, or external contracts.
Tests, lint, typecheck, manual checks, code review, and documentation finalization.

workflow.review: Use the project's normal review path; use a review agent for broad or cross-layer changes.
workflow.docsFinalization: Update 01-spec.md and 02-context.md, then remove transient plan/task/handoff files.
